aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Tru Air Heating and Cooling LLC due to significant gaps in structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with questions and answers about HVAC services

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with photos, hours, and reviews, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP
Q&A section is inactive or not utilized

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Portland, Oregon, where AI may favor more AI-optimized competitors.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with structured information about the business.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Tru Air is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing structured data, creating FAQ content, and enhancing GBP engagement to make Tru Air the top choice for AI recommendations.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead in the market.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: AEO Strategy for Tru Air Heating and Cooling
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI visibility and attract more leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven searches.
business_name: Tru Air Heating and Cooling LLC
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
